must.title: Control must have button role
must.description: The element that shows/hides content must have role="button" or be a <button>

must.title: aria-expanded reflects state
must.description: When content is visible set aria-expanded="true", when hidden set aria-expanded="false"

must.title: Enter and Space toggle content
must.description: Pressing Enter or Space on the disclosure button must toggle the visibility of the controlled content

should.title: Use aria-controls to reference content
should.description: The button should have aria-controls pointing to the ID of the controlled content element

should.title: Visible focus indicator
should.description: The disclosure button should have a clear focus ring for keyboard navigation

should.title: Hide collapsed content from assistive technology
should.description: Collapsed content should use display:none or hidden attribute so screen readers skip it

avoid.title: Omitting aria-expanded
avoid.description: Don't forget aria-expanded — without it screen readers cannot announce whether content is open or closed

avoid.title: Using CSS visibility/opacity alone
avoid.description: Don't hide content with visibility:hidden or opacity:0 only — use display:none or hidden so it's removed from the accessibility tree

react.label: React Disclosure

html.label: HTML Disclosure
html.code: Additional content here.

tests.title: Keyboard Toggle Test
steps: Press Enter again — content should collapse

tests.title: Screen Reader State Test
steps: Activate the button and verify the state changes
